accuracyNote: The supplied documents describe the LCD inputs and operating ranges but do not publish the synergic algorithm's resulting wire-speed/voltage pairs. Do not fabricate numeric outputs.

modes.machineBehavior: The synergic program sets a starting wire speed and voltage; make a test weld on same-thickness scrap and use the manual's diagnosis guide to tune it.
The synergic program supplies a starting point. Confirm DCEN for self-shielded wire and tune only after a scrap test.
supportedMaterials: stainless steel when supported by the selected wire

modes.machineBehavior: Select the process and set current; foot-pedal mode varies current up to the selected maximum.
modes.unsupportedNote: The OmniPro 220 is DC TIG; the manual does not support AC TIG aluminum.

modes.machineBehavior: Select the electrode and set current, then tune with a scrap weld while observing duty-cycle limits.
